remember: Students will be able to recall the basic concepts of magnetism and magnetic fields.
Students will be able to remember the properties of magnets and the Earth's magnetic field.
Students will be able to identify the different types of magnetic materials.
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of magnetic induction and its effects.
Students will be able to describe the behavior of magnetic materials in different situations.
Students will be able to understand the relationship between magnetic fields and electric currents.
apply: Students will be able to apply the concepts of magnetism to solve problems related to magnetic fields and materials.
Students will be able to use the principles of magnetism to analyze the behavior of magnetic systems.
Students will be able to design and propose simple magnetic systems and experiments.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the magnetic properties of different materials and their applications.
Students will be able to evaluate the effects of magnetic fields on various systems and phenomena.
Students will be able to compare and contrast different types of magnetic materials and their uses.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: To understand the basic concepts of magnetism and magnetic fields.
As per NCERT objective 2: To comprehend the properties of magnets and the Earth's magnetic field.
As per NCERT objective 3: To apply the principles of magnetism to solve problems and analyze magnetic systems.
board_exam_objectives: To test the understanding of magnetic concepts and their applications.
To evaluate the ability to solve problems related to magnetism and magnetic materials.
To assess the knowledge of magnetic phenomena and their relevance to real-life situations.
